description: Configure Stellarium to simulate the night sky from Cusco, Peru (13.53° S, 71.97° W, 3400m) during the 1450 Inti Raymi (Winter Solstice) festival on June 21, 1450, at 03:00 UTC. Set the sky culture to 'Inca', disable the atmosphere and ground, enable constellation lines and art, and increase the Milky Way intensity to at least 4.0. Save these configuration settings. Locate and center the view on Alpha Centauri to reveal the 'Llama' dark constellation and take a screenshot. Create a lecture notes file at /home/ga/Desktop/inca_lecture_notes.txt documenting the location (Cusco), historical date (June 1450), sky culture (Inca), and a note explaining that the Llama is a 'dark constellation' marked by Alpha Centauri.
